name: 13" Monstera Plant - Room Essentials™
description:
Create an eye-catching focal point in your indoor setting with this Artificial Monstera Potted Plant from Room Essentials™. This artificial potted plant showcases a lush green monstera inside a white melamine pot with faux soil filler for quick and easy display. Place it on your kitchen counter, windowsill, entryway console or any other spot to add a natural touch without the need for any watering.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
